title: rosa × dumetorum var. erythrantha
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. erythrantha, also known as the wild rose or Rosa dumetorum erythrantha, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. erythrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
